title: orchis collina f. flavescens
intro: Orchis collina f. flavescens, also known as the yellow-flowered keel orchid, is a subspecies of the Orchis collina plant, belonging to the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Orchis collina f. flavescens include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
